ink_on_paper.note: ECDFC6 on 1B2418 at 14px body — comfortably above AA

primary_on_show_paper.note: B86A2E on 1B2418 — meets AA for 14px normal text

primary_on_default_paper.note: B86A2E on default Pantheon paper 0E0B08 — passes AA for show-card primary on global index

sigil_derivation_note: 320x320 sigil is the TopChefSigil 80x80 paths scaled 4x verbatim (pediment gable, crossed knives, chef-hat ellipses, vessel ellipse with two cross-bars). Stroke weights scaled proportionally: 1.5 -> 6, 1.0 -> 4, 4.0 -> 16.

facade_composition.pediment: gable triangle + crossed-knives X + chef-hat ellipses at upper blade ends (scaled from sigil)
facade_composition.frieze: tiled-mosaic diamond pattern, 24 tiles wide, every-third tile filled primary

columns.outer_four: knife-rack treatment — twin vertical knife blades on rails, alternating blade orientation
columns.center: tall apothecary vessel extending the sigil's mortar/pot — two cross-bars from sigil repeated as five horizontal bands, stoppered top in primary

facade_composition.ornament_dispersal: peppercorn-cluster triads scattered along base strata between column footprints

ornaments.ornament-1: paring knife — diagonal blade in primary, ink handle with rivets
ornaments.ornament-2: herb sprig — central stem with alternating leaves, primary leaf accents
ornaments.ornament-3: peppercorn cluster — three filled circles in primary with ink highlights
